tuning: E A D G B E
content:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
                        Ice Box - Omarion (acoustic)
----------------------------------------------------------------------


Hi everybody, this is an easy version by LAMHIBI, of ICE BOX - Omarion.
Hope you enjoy it guys.
contact me on : fb.com/walid.kira.neo


[Verse 1] : [ch]C[/ch] , [ch]Em[/ch] , [ch]Am[/ch] , [ch]F[/ch]

[ch]C[/ch]                                         
[tab]                                           [ch]Em[/ch]
Fussin' and fightin', we back at it again    [/tab]
                                    
[tab]                                                       [ch]Am[/ch]
I know that, it's my fault, but you don't understand (no)[/tab]

[tab]                                                [ch]F[/ch]
I got memories, this is crazy You ain't nothing[/tab]

like the girl I used to know


[Bridge] : [ch]Am[/ch] , [ch]G[/ch] , [ch]C[/ch] , [ch]E[/ch] 
                                                                                        
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                                              [ch]G[/ch]
Girl I really wanna work this out, cause I'm tired of fightin'[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                                               [ch]E[/ch]
And I really hope you still want me the way I want you[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                                              [ch]G[/ch]
I said I really wanna work this out, damn girl I'm tryin'[/tab]

It's no excuse, no excuse
       E*
But I got this

[Chorus 2x] : [ch]C[/ch] , [ch]Em[/ch] , [ch]Am[/ch] , [ch]F[/ch] 

[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I got this icebox where my heart used to be (but I got this)[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I got this icebox where my heart used to be (oooh)[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm so cold, I'm so cold, I'm so cold(oooh), I'm so cold[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
I'm so cold, I'm so cold.[/tab]


[Verse 2] : [ch]C[/ch] , [ch]Em[/ch] , [ch]Am[/ch] , [ch]F[/ch] 

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Why can't I get it right, just can't let it go[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                                        
I opened up, she let me down, I won't feel that no more[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I got memories, this is crazy[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
She ain't nothing like the girl I used to know[/tab]


[Bridge] : [ch]Am[/ch] , [ch]G[/ch] , [ch]C[/ch] , [ch]E[/ch] 
                                                                                        
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                                              [ch]G[/ch]
Girl I really wanna work this out, cause I'm tired of fightin'[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                                               [ch]E[/ch]
And I really hope you still want me the way I want you[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                                              [ch]G[/ch]
I said I really wanna work this out, damn girl I'm tryin'[/tab]

It's no excuse, no excuse
       E*
But I got this

[Chorus 2x] : [ch]C[/ch] , [ch]Em[/ch] , [ch]Am[/ch] , [ch]F[/ch] 

[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I got this icebox where my heart used to be (but I got this)[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I got this icebox where my heart used to be (oooh)[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm so cold, I'm so cold, I'm so cold(oooh), I'm so cold[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
I'm so cold, I'm so cold[/tab]
